5. The offer is valid only for successful/approved transactions.
6. No two offers can be availed simultaneously.

8. The offer can be redeemed only once every 48 hours for Rs. 1100-2499, Rs. 2500-4999 and Rs. 5000 & above slabs. This applies to one offer slab, which can be only redeemed once every 24 hours.
9. Discount offer cannot be combined or exchanged with any other offer provided by Shell.
10. Shell reserves all rights to withdraw offer without giving any prior intimation
11. Shell GO+ terms & conditions apply.
12. By participating in the offer, the customers shall be deemed to have accepted these terms & conditions.
